text:
is a song written by Tokiko Iwatani and Hiroshi Miyagawa and performed by the duo The Peanuts in 1962 https://www.oricon.co.jp/prof/136067/lyrics/I062752/ . It was featured in the soundtrack of the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance released in 2009. It is track 35 on the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack.

In the film, Shinji listens to this song on the radio in his room as he talks to himself about looking forward to Rei's dinner party and wishing that his father could come.

Trivia

In addition to their successful music career, The Peanuts starred in the 1961 film ' and two film sequels to it involving , and that were both released in 1964, ' and '. https://www.godzillacineaste.net/people/peanuts .
